nasb.text: And He found in the temple those who were selling oxen and sheep and doves, and the money changers seated at their tables.

esv.text: In the temple he found those who were selling oxen and sheep and pigeons, and the money-changers sitting there.

cnv.text: 他在聖殿的外院裡看見有賣牛羊鴿子的，和坐在那裡兌換銀錢的，

ccb.text: 祂看见圣殿区有人在卖牛羊和鸽子，还有人在兑换银币，

csbs.text: 他看见圣殿里有卖牛、羊、鸽子的，还有兑换银币的人坐在那里。
